# Grand Strand Ally

## Business

- Name: Grand Strand Ally
- Domain: https://gsally.com
- Industry: Information Technology Services
- Business type: Managed service provider for small and medium businesses

## Description

Grand Strand Ally helps small and medium businesses in the Myrtle Beach and Grand Strand area of South Carolina gain clearer visibility into their information technology costs, simplify vendor and tool structure, and strengthen compliance-minded support operations. The company offers month-to-month managed information technology support with no long-term contracts, starting with a free cost analysis of each client's current environment.

## Location and Service Area

- Primary city: Myrtle Beach, SC
- Region: Grand Strand, South Carolina
- Counties served: Horry County, Georgetown County
- Nearby communities: Conway, North Myrtle Beach, Surfside Beach, Murrells Inlet, Pawleys Island, Little River, Socastee

- Homepage: https://gsally.com/

## Service Pages

- Managed IT Support (Myrtle Beach): https://gsally.com/managed-it-support-myrtle-beach
- Microsoft 365 Support: https://gsally.com/microsoft-365-support
- IT Cost Analysis: https://gsally.com/it-cost-analysis
- Cybersecurity and Compliance Support: https://gsally.com/cybersecurity-compliance-support
- Backup and Recovery Support: https://gsally.com/backup-recovery-support
- Onboarding and Offboarding Automation: https://gsally.com/onboarding-offboarding-automation

## Services Offered

- Managed Information Technology Support — predictable monthly support with clear ownership and fewer vendors to manage
- Microsoft 365 Administration — right-sized licensing, cleaner admin controls, and consistent user lifecycle management
- Information Technology Cost Analysis — structured review of current spending, vendor overlap, and simplification opportunities
- Cybersecurity and Compliance Support — practical security controls, access management, and compliance-minded configurations
- Backup and Recovery — automated, tested backups supporting business continuity and documentation requirements
- Onboarding and Offboarding Automation — standardized user lifecycle workflows that reduce compliance risk and manual effort

## Offer and Landing Pages

- Free IT cost analysis overview: https://gsally.com/free-it-cost-analysis
  Overview of what the free cost analysis covers, who it is for, and what to expect from the process.

- Free IT cost analysis tool: https://gsally.com/cost-analysis
  A free, no-login-required interactive tool that helps businesses estimate their current information technology spend, identify overlapping tools and vendor redundancy, and surface compliance considerations. Takes approximately five minutes to complete.

## Educational Pages

- How much should a small business spend on IT support: https://gsally.com/how-much-should-a-small-business-spend-on-it-support
  Benchmarks by company size and risk profile, with signals for both over- and underspending.

- How to find overlapping IT tools and vendors: https://gsally.com/how-to-find-overlapping-it-tools-and-vendors
  A four-step process for mapping your vendor stack and finding where you are paying twice for the same capability.

- Small business employee offboarding checklist: https://gsally.com/small-business-offboarding-checklist
  Organized by timing — covering account disabling, license reclamation, file transfer, and access audits.

- What an IT cost analysis should include: https://gsally.com/what-an-it-cost-analysis-should-include
  The five areas a useful analysis covers, and five red flags that signal a sales pitch instead.

## Contact

- Email: shawn@gsally.com
- Phone: 973-202-1455
- Contact form: https://gsally.com/contact

## Key Positioning

- No long-term contracts required
- Month-to-month service agreements
- Scope defined before work begins
- Free cost analysis available to all prospective clients
- Focus on cost clarity, practical support, and compliance-minded systems
